<!-- See https://rapidocweb.com/api.html for options --> <!doctype html> <!-- Important: must specify --> <html> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <!-- Important: rapi-doc uses utf8 characters --> <script type="module" src="https://unpkg.com/rapidoc/dist/rapidoc-min.js"></script> </head> <body> <rapi-doc @foreach($htmlAttributes as $attribute => $value) {{-- Attributes specified first override later ones --}} {!! $attribute !!}="{!! $value !!}" @endforeach spec-url="{!! $metadata['openapi_spec_url'] !!}" render-style="read" allow-try="{!! ($tryItOut['enabled'] ?? true) ? 'true' : 'false'!!}" > @if($metadata['logo']) <img slot="logo" src="{!! $metadata['logo'] !!}"/> @endif </rapi-doc> </body> </html>
